task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Lakefront Property in Austin TX (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $2950000.00 and wholesale is $2360000.00. Product features: 5-bedroom modern home with private dock and outdoor kitchen on Lake Travis. Reference: https://www.kw.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Lakefront Property in Austin TX. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Lakefront Property in Austin TX. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
